data.name: Goth Femboy Desire
data.detailed_description:
大學畢業本應是一個激動人心的嶄新篇章，但對 Connor 來說，現實卻截然不同。他深陷於枯燥的辦公室文書工作，忍受著孤獨的煎熬，無比懷念大學時期的熱情與活力。直到一個陽光明媚的下午，他遇見了神祕而迷人的 Luna —— 一位將他的世界徹底顛覆的 Femboy。

在這部充滿誘惑且幽默的視覺小說中，跟隨 Connor 的視角，體驗現代約會與自我探索的複雜交織。體驗一段約 30 分鐘的專注線性故事，引導 Connor 完成與 Luna 的邂逅，並揭開他們內心深處的渴望。

Connor 是會鼓起勇氣追求夢想、把握當下，還是會任由這個一生一次的機會從指縫中溜走？

遊戲內容：

  • 口交 (Blowjob)

  • 毒龍 (Rimming)

  • 肛交 (Anal sex)

  • 磨鏡 (Frotting)

  • 戶外性愛 (Public sex)

請注意：《Goth Femboy Desire》是一部專注的短篇故事，旨在一次性體驗完成（遊戲時間約為 30 分鐘）。這是一個專為喜愛精煉、敘事驅動體驗的玩家而設計的氛圍之旅。

支持 Sweet Lollipop Studio 的未來

購買這款遊戲，你所做的不僅是遊玩，更是直接為我們下一個充滿雄心的重大專案提供動力。作為一名獨立開發者，每一份支持都讓我能夠投入更多的時間和資源，去創造更深入、更宏大的遊戲體驗。

感謝你成為這段旅程的一員！

data.short_description: Femboy、枯燥的辦公室、以及意想不到的慾望。 與神祕而迷人的 Luna 一起逃離沉悶的職場生活吧。他是一位即將徹底改變你世界的 Femboy。這是一部時長約 30 分鐘、充滿激情且幽默的視覺小說，專為那些明確知道自己追求什麼的玩家打造。

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system OS: Window 10 64-bit +
  • 處理器: Intel i5 2.3GHz or AMD A9 2.9GHz
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectSound (DirectX) compatible sound card
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system OS: Window 10 64-bit +
  • 處理器: Intel i5 2.3GHz or AMD Ryzen 2.9GHz
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GTX 970 or AMD RX 560 2GB equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectSound (DirectX) compatible sound card

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: MacOS 10.13 High Sierra or later
  • 處理器: Intel i3 (2nd gen) or Apple Silicon (via Rosetta 2)
  • 記憶體: 2 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡:
  • 儲存空間: 250 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: N/A

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 18.04 LTS or SteamOS 3.0 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel i3 (2nd gen) or AMD equivalent
  • 記憶體: 2 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 compatible GPU
  • 儲存空間: 250 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: N/A

data.name: Goth Femboy Desire
data.detailed_description:
Graduating from college was supposed to be the start of an exciting new chapter, but for Connor, it's been anything but. Stuck in a boring desk job and feeling the sting of loneliness, he longs for the passion and excitement of his college days. One sunny afternoon, he crosses paths with the mysterious and alluring Luna, a femboy who turns his world upside down.

In this steamy and humorous visual novel, follow Connor as he navigates the complexities of modern dating and self-discovery. Experience a focused, linear story that unfolds over approximately 30 minutes, guiding Connor through his encounter with Luna and uncovering their desires.

Will Connor find the courage to pursue his dreams and seize the day, or will he let this once-in-a-lifetime opportunity slip through his fingers?

Content :

  • Blowjob

  • Riming

  • Anal sex

  • Frotting

  • Public sex

Please note: Goth Femboy Desire is a focused short story designed to be experienced in one sitting (approximately 30 minutes of gameplay). It is an atmospheric journey intended for players who appreciate concise, narrative-driven experiences.

Support the Future of Sweet Lollipop Studio

By purchasing this game, you are doing more than just playing. You are directly fueling the development of our next major ambitious project. As an independent developer, every bit of support allows me to dedicate more time and resources to creating deeper, larger gaming experiences.

Thank you for being part of this journey!

data.short_description: Femboy. Office boredom. Unexpected desire. Escape the corporate grind with Luna, a mysterious and alluring femboy who’s about to turn your world upside down. A steamy, humorous, and high-heat 30-minute visual novel.
